channel.title: Airflow on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Airflow on Home

item.title: Ecommerce ELT Pipeline
item.description: Build-up the data infrastructure using generated data crafted to mirror real-world data from leading tech companies. Data pipeline, data modelling, data viz.

item.title: RAWG ETL
item.description: This is a data engineering project that focuses on analyzing the latest six months of game data from the website Rawg.io using their provided API.
